title: Guava Flow Cytometry Protocol
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ikyccxw

steps.title: Click CLEANING from the main menu...
steps.instruction: Click CLEANING from the main menu Always clean the machine before and after use

steps.title: Load the following
steps.instruction: Load the following: *dH 2 O in W1,W2, W3, W4, W5, W6, and position 1 *100 µL bleach in position 2 *GUAVA ICF in position 3 and 4 *dH 2 O in capillary shutdown (position 9)

steps.title: To ensure optimal performance, allow the...
steps.instruction: To ensure optimal performance, allow the machine to warm up for at least 10 min prior to acquiring samples.

steps.title: Select InCyte from the main menu
steps.instruction: Select InCyte from the main menu

steps.title: Define the worklist parameters (e
steps.instruction: Define the worklist parameters (e.g., wells to analyze, events to acquire, time to acquire, dilution factor, original volume, replicates, etc)

steps.title: Select the folder where you want...
steps.instruction: Select the folder where you want to save the data file and click SAVE

steps.title: Select the Analysis Method that you...
steps.instruction: Select the Analysis Method that you want to use for your specific sample set. To open a saved method, click RETRIEVE on the dialog box, then OPEN. If you want to creat a new Analysis Method, click NEW, then OK and set the parameters.

steps.title: Place the microtiter plate in the tray
steps.instruction: Place the microtiter plate in the tray

steps.title: Load the following cleaning solutions
steps.instruction: Load the following cleaning solutions: *dH 2 O in W2, W4, W5 *Empty tubes in W5, W6 *100 µL bleach in W1 *ICF in position 10 *dH 2 O in position 9 (capillary shutdown)

steps.title: Select the sample for ADJUST SETTINGS in the dialog box
steps.instruction: Select the sample for ADJUST SETTINGS in the dialog box

steps.title: Select the type of plots and...
steps.instruction: Select the type of plots and parameters you wish to display

steps.title: Use the GAIN CONTROLS to select...
steps.instruction: Use the GAIN CONTROLS to select the Threshold parameter from the drop-down menu and use to adjust the gains (FSC, SSC, GRN, YLW, RED, NIR, RED2, or NIR2)

steps.title: To adjust COMPENSATION, click NEXT STEP, then ADJUST SETTINGS
steps.instruction: To adjust COMPENSATION, click NEXT STEP, then ADJUST SETTINGS

steps.title: When you are finished adjusting the settings, click NEXT STEP
steps.instruction: When you are finished adjusting the settings, click NEXT STEP.

steps.title: Click RESUME WORKLIST and it will begin acquiring samples
steps.instruction: Click RESUME WORKLIST and it will begin acquiring samples
